name: Hearty Turkey Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and chopped
1 1/2 cups mixed vegetables, thawed and drained
10 3/4 ounces low-fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine mashed potatoes and 1/2 cup cheese. Spoon the potato mixture into the prepared dish.
4. Using the back of a spoon, spread the potatoes across the bottom and up the sides of the dish to form a shell.
5. In another mixing bowl, combine turkey, vegetables, soup, milk, mustard, garlic powder, and black pepper.
6. Pour the mixture over the potato shell.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Top with remaining cheese and bake for an additional 3 minutes or until the cheese has melted.
